name: apexlint-demo
description: Apexlint — deterministic linter for Apex, Flow JSON, and n8n DSL, with a live Cloudflare Pages Function backend. Public portfolio demo.

scripts.build:test-engine: tsc src/components/rules.ts --outDir tests/.engine-build --target es2022 --module nodenext --moduleResolution nodenext --skipLibCheck
